violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Burger/chislic cooler was noted above 41 degrees F. Prodouct was removed and discarded.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler. Hamburger meat in tub noted being stored on the floor.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood filters noted in need of cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning. Ceiling and vent covers noted in need of cleaning.
LIGHTING (1 pts): Some light covers noted broken in the kitchen.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting board not properly maintained. Can opener noted not properly maintained. Inside of reach in coolers/freezers noted not properly maintained.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood filters noted in need of cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning especially under equipment. Restroom vent cover noted in need of cleaning.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the ice in the bar area.
